quiz.question:
White wants to keep the tension, and not trade pieces immediately. Qb1 comes to mind, to attack the
bishop on f5 and keep the tension. 

Is that a good idea?

answers.text: No, since Black has a tactic.

feedback.text: Good job! Next would come ...Bxd3, we would recapture with the queen and ...Bxh2! A discovered attack on our queen.

distractors.text: Yes, Black’s king is still in the center, and the position is very dangerous for Black.

feedback.text: Try to watch out for any tactical shots by Black!

distractors.text: No, Black can simply castle long and get into safety.

feedback.text: Does Black have anything else after we play Qb1?
